title: plantago maritima var. californica
intro: Plantago maritima var. californica, also known as California sea plantain, is a variety of the sea plantain plant, a coastal succulent native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plantago maritima var. californica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally to promote wound healing and internally to support overall health and well-being.
